title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Tata Communications

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Tata Communications
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata Communications. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Tata Communications:
Tata Communications is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications!
